title: clerodendrum cuneiforme
intro: Clerodendrum cuneiforme, also known as the wedge leaf glory bower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Clerodendrum cuneiforme is often used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
